title: lastrea japonica var. glabrata
intro: Lastrea japonica var. glabrata, also known as the glabrate Japanese fern or the glabrate autumn fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lastrea japonica var. glabrata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Lastrea japonica var. glabrata can be made into infusions, decoctions, or teas, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
